verses.1: “My soul is weary of my life.
verses.2: I will tell God, ‘Do not condemn me.
verses.3: Is it good to you that you should oppress,
verses.4: Do you have eyes of flesh?
verses.5: Are your days as the days of mortals,
verses.6: that you inquire after my iniquity,
verses.7: Although you know that I am not wicked,
verses.8: “‘Your hands have framed me and fashioned me altogether,
verses.9: Remember, I beg you, that you have fashioned me as clay.
verses.10: Haven’t you poured me out like milk,
verses.11: You have clothed me with skin and flesh,
verses.12: You have granted me life and loving kindness.
verses.13: Yet you hid these things in your heart.
verses.14: if I sin, then you mark me.
verses.15: If I am wicked, woe to me.
verses.16: If my head is held high, you hunt me like a lion.
verses.17: You renew your witnesses against me,
verses.18: “‘Why, then, have you brought me out of the womb?
verses.19: I should have been as though I had not been.
verses.21: before I go where I will not return from,
